prompt: generate a weather map reimagined as an emotional landscape, where storm systems represent anger, sunny areas show joy, fog indicates confusion, and rainbow bridges connect different mood territories
prompt_refined: Generate an image: A weather map conceptualized as an emotional landscape. On this map, raging storm systems embody anger. Expansive, brightly lit sunny zones depict joy. Areas of dense, swirling fog represent confusion. Vibrant rainbow bridges visually connect these distinct mood territories.
objects: Visual depiction of anger (associated with storms)
Visual depiction of joy (associated with sunny zones)
Visual depiction of confusion (associated with fog)
Visual connections between distinct mood territories
